requirement_topic.en: EMC Standards for Radio and Telecom Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电及电信设备电磁兼容标准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電及電信設備電磁相容標準

summary.en: Timor-Leste does not maintain an independent national EMC standards body. ANACOM accepts EMC test reports prepared against internationally recognised standards, primarily ITU-R recommendations, ETSI standards, and CISPR/IEC standards, as part of the technical file for type approval under Law No. 3/2021. As Timor-Leste has a Portuguese colonial heritage and was administered by the UN (UNTAET) before independence, its regulatory framework draws on both European (ETSI/CE) and ITU frameworks. Test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories against ETSI EN 301 489 series (EMC for radio equipment) or equivalent CISPR/IEC standards are the most appropriate submission evidence. Timor-Leste is an ITU member state and coordinates spectrum use accordingly.
summary.zh: 东帝汶没有独立的国家电磁兼容标准机构。ANACOM在《2021年第3号电子通信法》型号认证技术文件中接受依据国际认可标准（主要为ITU-R建议书、ETSI标准及CISPR/IEC标准）编制的电磁兼容测试报告。鉴于东帝汶的葡萄牙殖民历史及独立前由联合国（UNTAET）管理的背景，其监管框架同时借鉴欧洲（ETSI/CE）及ITU框架。针对ETSI EN 301 489系列（无线电设备电磁兼容）或等效CISPR/IEC标准，由ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的测试报告是最适合的提交证据。东帝汶是ITU成员国，依此协调频谱使用。
summary.zht: 東帝汶沒有獨立的國家電磁相容標準機構。ANACOM在《2021年第3號電子通信法》型號認證技術文件中接受依據國際認可標準（主要為ITU-R建議書、ETSI標準及CISPR/IEC標準）編製的電磁相容測試報告。鑒於東帝汶的葡萄牙殖民歷史及獨立前由聯合國（UNTAET）管理的背景，其監管框架同時借鑒歐洲（ETSI/CE）及ITU框架。針對ETSI EN 301 489系列（無線電設備電磁相容）或等效CISPR/IEC標準，由ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的測試報告是最適合的提交證據。東帝汶是ITU成員國，依此協調頻譜使用。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications — Timor-Leste (technical file requirement for type approval)
ETSI EN 301 489 series — EMC standard for radio equipment and services (European, widely accepted)
CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment EMC — Emission requirements (IEC/CISPR)
CISPR 35 — Multimedia equipment EMC — Immunity requirements (IEC/CISPR)
ITU-R Radio Regulations — Timor-Leste ITU membership obligations

summary.en: China-origin wireless devices are tested against GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment EMC, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB/T 17626 series (EMC immunity, aligned with IEC 61000-4 series) at CNAS-accredited laboratories. SRRC type approval includes radio frequency emissions compliance. These Chinese test reports and approvals are not directly accepted by ANACOM; however, CNAS-accredited laboratories hold ILAC MRA signatory status, so CNAS-accredited test reports may be presented to ANACOM if the tests were conducted to ETSI/CISPR/IEC standards (not solely to GB standards). Re-testing to ETSI EN 301 489 or equivalent IEC/CISPR standards at an ILAC-member laboratory may be required if existing Chinese test reports only reference GB standards.
summary.zh: 中国产无线设备须在CNAS认可实验室依据GB/T 9254（信息技术设备电磁兼容，与CISPR 22/32对标）及GB/T 17626系列（电磁兼容抗扰度，与IEC 61000-4系列对标）进行测试。SRRC型号核准包含无线电频率发射合规。上述中国测试报告及批准不被ANACOM直接接受；但由于CNAS认可实验室具有ILAC MRA签署方资格，如测试依据ETSI/CISPR/IEC标准（而非仅依据GB标准）开展，CNAS认可的测试报告可向ANACOM提交。若现有中国测试报告仅引用GB标准，则可能需要在ILAC成员实验室按ETSI EN 301 489或等效IEC/CISPR标准重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國產無線設備須在CNAS認可實驗室依據GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備電磁相容，與CISPR 22/32對標）及GB/T 17626系列（電磁相容抗擾度，與IEC 61000-4系列對標）進行測試。SRRC型號核准包含無線電頻率發射合規。上述中國測試報告及批准不被ANACOM直接接受；但由於CNAS認可實驗室具有ILAC MRA簽署方資格，如測試依據ETSI/CISPR/IEC標準（而非僅依據GB標準）開展，CNAS認可的測試報告可向ANACOM提交。若現有中國測試報告僅引用GB標準，則可能需要在ILAC成員實驗室按ETSI EN 301 489或等效IEC/CISPR標準重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB/T 17626 series — EMC immunity (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series)
SRRC radio type approval — MIIT (includes RF emissions compliance)
CNAS — China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment (ILAC MRA signatory)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 or GB/T 17626 test reports alone are not accepted by ANACOM for EMC compliance. ANACOM requires test reports against internationally recognised standards such as ETSI EN 301 489 or CISPR/IEC equivalents from an ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory. If existing Chinese CNAS-accredited test reports were conducted to ETSI or CISPR/IEC standards (not only to GB standards), they may be presentable to ANACOM — this should be confirmed directly with ANACOM prior to submission. If only GB-standard test reports exist, re-testing at an ILAC-member laboratory to ETSI/CISPR/IEC standards is likely required. SRRC type approval does not substitute for ANACOM EMC compliance.
gap.zh: 仅凭中国GB/T 9254或GB/T 17626测试报告，ANACOM不接受其作为电磁兼容合规证明。ANACOM要求ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具依据ETSI EN 301 489或CISPR/IEC等效标准的测试报告。若现有中国CNAS认可测试报告系依据ETSI或CISPR/IEC标准（而非仅依据GB标准）开展测试，则可能可向ANACOM提交——应在提交前直接向ANACOM确认。若仅有GB标准测试报告，则可能需要在ILAC成员实验室按ETSI/CISPR/IEC标准重新测试。SRRC型号核准不能替代ANACOM电磁兼容合规要求。
gap.zht: 僅憑中國GB/T 9254或GB/T 17626測試報告，ANACOM不接受其作為電磁相容合規證明。ANACOM要求ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具依據ETSI EN 301 489或CISPR/IEC等效標準的測試報告。若現有中國CNAS認可測試報告系依據ETSI或CISPR/IEC標準（而非僅依據GB標準）開展測試，則可能可向ANACOM提交——應在提交前直接向ANACOM確認。若僅有GB標準測試報告，則可能需要在ILAC成員實驗室按ETSI/CISPR/IEC標準重新測試。SRRC型號核准不能替代ANACOM電磁相容合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC test reports to internationally recognised standards (ETSI EN 301 489 or CISPR/IEC) from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories required as part of ANACOM type approval technical file under Law No. 3/2021
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 EMC and GB/T 17626 immunity testing from CNAS-accredited laboratories; SRRC type approval includes RF emissions compliance

source.publisher: ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações, Timor-Leste

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANACOM accepts EMC test reports to internationally recognised standards (ETSI EN 301 489 series or CISPR/IEC equivalents) from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories as part of the type approval technical file. Chinese GB-standard-only test reports are not directly acceptable. If CNAS-accredited reports were conducted to ETSI/CISPR/IEC standards, they may qualify — confirm with ANACOM before submission. SRRC type approval does not substitute for ANACOM EMC compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ANACOM在型号认证技术文件中接受ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的符合国际认可标准（ETSI EN 301 489系列或CISPR/IEC等效标准）的电磁兼容测试报告。仅有中国GB标准测试报告的不被直接接受。若CNAS认可报告系依据ETSI/CISPR/IEC标准开展，则可能符合要求——提交前应向ANACOM确认。SRRC型号核准不能替代ANACOM电磁兼容合规要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ANACOM在型號認證技術文件中接受ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的符合國際認可標準（ETSI EN 301 489系列或CISPR/IEC等效標準）的電磁相容測試報告。僅有中國GB標準測試報告的不被直接接受。若CNAS認可報告系依據ETSI/CISPR/IEC標準開展，則可能符合要求——提交前應向ANACOM確認。SRRC型號核准不能替代ANACOM電磁相容合規要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Frequency Spectrum and 5 GHz Band Allocation
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱及5 GHz频段分配
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜及5 GHz頻段分配

summary.en: Timor-Leste is an ITU member state and manages radio frequency spectrum through ANACOM in accordance with the ITU Radio Regulations and national frequency allocation plans. The 5 GHz band (5150–5850 MHz) is allocated by ANACOM for use by Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax) and other RLAN (Radio Local Area Network) devices, consistent with ITU-R regional allocation. Devices operating in the 5 GHz band must demonstrate compliance with ANACOM's spectrum allocation and power limits as part of the type approval technical file. The 2.4 GHz (ISM) band is similarly available. ANACOM coordinates spectrum use regionally through ITU frameworks; Timor-Leste's geographic position near Australia and Indonesia means some spectrum coordination occurs with those neighbours.
summary.zh: 东帝汶是ITU成员国，由ANACOM依据ITU无线电规则及国家频率分配计划管理无线电频谱。5 GHz频段（5150–5850 MHz）由ANACOM分配用于Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）及其他无线局域网（RLAN）设备，与ITU-R地区分配一致。在5 GHz频段运行的设备须在型号认证技术文件中证明符合ANACOM的频谱分配及功率限制要求。2.4 GHz（ISM）频段同样可用。ANACOM通过ITU框架协调区域频谱使用；由于东帝汶毗邻澳大利亚和印度尼西亚，部分频谱协调工作涉及上述邻国。
summary.zht: 東帝汶是ITU成員國，由ANACOM依據ITU無線電規則及國家頻率分配計畫管理無線電頻譜。5 GHz頻段（5150–5850 MHz）由ANACOM分配用於Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）及其他無線區域網路（RLAN）裝置，與ITU-R地區分配一致。在5 GHz頻段運行的裝置須在型號認證技術文件中證明符合ANACOM的頻譜分配及功率限制要求。2.4 GHz（ISM）頻段同樣可用。ANACOM通過ITU框架協調區域頻譜使用；由於東帝汶毗鄰澳大利亞和印度尼西亞，部分頻譜協調工作涉及上述鄰國。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications — Timor-Leste (spectrum management provisions)
ITU Radio Regulations — Article 5 Frequency Allocations (Timor-Leste is ITU Region 3 member)
ITU-R M.1450 — Characteristics of broadband radio local area networks
ANACOM national frequency allocation plan (specific document to be confirmed with ANACOM)

summary.en: In China, the 5 GHz band is partially restricted: 5725–5850 MHz is available for indoor use under SRRC type approval; 5150–5350 MHz is for indoor use only. SRRC type approval covers radio frequency emissions, frequency hopping, output power, and channel plan compliance for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and other radio devices. Chinese SRRC approval is based on MIIT frequency allocation and is not transferable to Timor-Leste. Devices approved for China-specific frequency configurations (e.g., restricted 5 GHz sub-bands) may require configuration adjustment before use in Timor-Leste if ANACOM permits broader 5 GHz use.
summary.zh: 在中国，5 GHz频段部分受限：5725–5850 MHz在SRRC型号核准下可用于室内；5150–5350 MHz仅限室内使用。SRRC型号核准涵盖Wi-Fi、蓝牙及其他无线设备的无线电频率发射、跳频、输出功率及信道计划合规性。中国SRRC批准基于MIIT频率分配，不可转用于东帝汶。针对中国特定频率配置（如受限5 GHz子频段）批准的设备，若ANACOM允许更宽5 GHz使用，在东帝汶使用前可能需要调整配置。
summary.zht: 在中國，5 GHz頻段部分受限：5725–5850 MHz在SRRC型號核准下可用於室內；5150–5350 MHz僅限室內使用。SRRC型號核准涵蓋Wi-Fi、藍牙及其他無線設備的無線電頻率發射、跳頻、輸出功率及頻道計畫合規性。中國SRRC批准基於MIIT頻率分配，不可轉用於東帝汶。針對中國特定頻率配置（如受限5 GHz子頻段）批准的裝置，若ANACOM允許更寬5 GHz使用，在東帝汶使用前可能需要調整配置。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China
MIIT frequency allocation for 5 GHz RLAN (China-specific sub-band restrictions)
YD/T 1311 series — Wireless LAN technical requirements (China domestic standard)

gap.en: China's 5 GHz sub-band restrictions (particularly 5150–5350 MHz indoor-only and partial availability of 5470–5725 MHz) differ from Timor-Leste's ITU-aligned allocation. Devices designed to China's SRRC-approved frequency configuration may need firmware or hardware adjustment to enable sub-bands that ANACOM permits but SRRC restricts. SRRC type approval is not accepted by ANACOM; a separate ANACOM type approval technical file demonstrating compliance with ANACOM frequency allocation and power limits is required. The specific ANACOM sub-band permissions for 5 GHz should be confirmed directly with ANACOM prior to product submission.
gap.zh: 中国5 GHz子频段限制（特别是5150–5350 MHz仅限室内及5470–5725 MHz部分可用）与东帝汶基于ITU的频率分配存在差异。针对中国SRRC批准频率配置设计的设备，可能需要固件或硬件调整，以启用ANACOM允许但SRRC限制的子频段。SRRC型号核准不被ANACOM接受；须提交单独的ANACOM型号认证技术文件，证明符合ANACOM频率分配及功率限制要求。5 GHz频段的具体ANACOM子频段许可应在产品提交前直接向ANACOM确认。
gap.zht: 中國5 GHz子頻段限制（特別是5150–5350 MHz僅限室內及5470–5725 MHz部分可用）與東帝汶基於ITU的頻率分配存在差異。針對中國SRRC批准頻率配置設計的裝置，可能需要韌體或硬體調整，以啟用ANACOM允許但SRRC限制的子頻段。SRRC型號核准不被ANACOM接受；須提交單獨的ANACOM型號認證技術文件，證明符合ANACOM頻率分配及功率限制要求。5 GHz頻段的具體ANACOM子頻段許可應在產品提交前直接向ANACOM確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — radio frequency compliance (5 GHz and 2.4 GHz band allocation, output power limits) must be demonstrated in the ANACOM type approval technical file under Law No. 3/2021; ANACOM is the spectrum authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval (MIIT) required for all radio-frequency devices operating in China; specific 5 GHz sub-band restrictions apply under Chinese frequency allocation

source.publisher: ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações, Timor-Leste

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANACOM has allocated the 5 GHz band for RLAN/Wi-Fi use in Timor-Leste under ITU-R regional frameworks. Chinese SRRC type approval and China-specific 5 GHz sub-band configurations are not accepted by ANACOM. A separate ANACOM type approval technical file demonstrating frequency allocation compliance and output power limits is required. Confirm specific 5 GHz sub-band permissions directly with ANACOM prior to device submission, as China and Timor-Leste frequency configurations may differ.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ANACOM已依据ITU-R地区框架，为东帝汶的RLAN/Wi-Fi使用分配了5 GHz频段。中国SRRC型号核准及中国特定5 GHz子频段配置不被ANACOM接受。须提交单独的ANACOM型号认证技术文件，证明符合频率分配及输出功率限制要求。在设备提交前，应直接向ANACOM确认具体5 GHz子频段许可，因中国与东帝汶频率配置可能存在差异。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ANACOM已依據ITU-R地區框架，為東帝汶的RLAN/Wi-Fi使用分配了5 GHz頻段。中國SRRC型號核准及中國特定5 GHz子頻段配置不被ANACOM接受。須提交單獨的ANACOM型號認證技術文件，證明符合頻率分配及輸出功率限制要求。在裝置提交前，應直接向ANACOM確認具體5 GHz子頻段許可，因中國與東帝汶頻率配置可能存在差異。
